phaseGoal: Backlog manual de oportunidades por cliente — schema + RLS + CRUD + widget (matriz 2x2 + lista) + Promote -> Project com DS Inception linkada.

userStories.title: Migration: Opportunity table + enum
userStories.description: Cria enum OpportunityStatus e tabela Opportunity (PRD §7.1) com checks (impact/effort BETWEEN 1 AND 5), FKs (clientId ON DELETE CASCADE, sources ON DELETE SET NULL, promotedProjectId ON DELETE SET NULL, createdBy ON DELETE RESTRICT) e índices parciais.

verifiable.expected: CREATE TYPE / CREATE TABLE / CREATE INDEX (no error)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT relrowsecurity FROM pg_class WHERE relname='Opportunity';
SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='Opportunity' ORDER BY indexname;

userStories.title: Migration: can_edit_client helper
userStories.description: Cria função SECURITY DEFINER can_edit_client(uuid) per PRD §7.2 — manager bypass + role check via ProjectAccess JOIN Project (role IN contributor,lead). GRANT EXECUTE TO authenticated.
acceptanceCriteria: Função can_edit_client existe com prosecdef=true (SECURITY DEFINER)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT proname, prosecdef FROM pg_proc WHERE proname='can_edit_client';

userStories.title: Migration: Opportunity RLS policies
userStories.description: Cria 4 policies em Opportunity per PRD §7.3 — opp_select (qualquer ProjectAccess no mesmo clientId OU manager), opp_insert/update/delete (can_edit_client check).
acceptanceCriteria: 4 policies registradas em pg_policy pra Opportunity
opp_select tem USING que JOIN ProjectAccess + Project

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT polname FROM pg_policy WHERE polrelid='"Opportunity"'::regclass ORDER BY polname;

userStories.title: Migration: touch updatedAt trigger
userStories.description: Cria função touch_opportunity_updated_at + trigger BEFORE UPDATE pra manter Opportunity.updatedAt sempre fresh, per PRD §7.4.
acceptanceCriteria: UPDATE numa Opportunity atualiza updatedAt automaticamente

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT tgname FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgrelid='"Opportunity"'::regclass AND tgname='trg_opportunity_touch_updated_at';

userStories.title: Regenerar database.types.ts
userStories.description: Roda supabase gen types e committa atualização contendo tipos Opportunity (Row/Insert/Update) + enum OpportunityStatus.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts contém 'Opportunity:' como key em Tables.public
tsc passa sem erro relacionado a Opportunity

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'Opportunity' | grep -v 'src/' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: DAL: opportunities.ts
userStories.description: Cria src/lib/dal/opportunities.ts com funções tipadas listByClient, getById, create, update, softReject, promote. promote() é idempotente (early return se promotedProjectId já existe) e roda transação: INSERT Project + INSERT DesignSession kind=inception + UPDATE Opportunity status=in_project + promotedProjectId.
acceptanceCriteria: Exporta listByClient(clientId), getById(id), create(input), update(id, patch), softReject(id), promote(id, projectName?)
promote() retorna { projectId: string, designSessionId: string } e é idempotente

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/lib/dal/opportunities' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: API GET/POST /api/clients/[id]/opportunities
userStories.description: Cria src/app/api/clients/[id]/opportunities/route.ts. GET retorna lista ordenada. POST valida Zod (title obrigatório, impact/effort 1-5, status optional default discovery, sources optional) e cria Opportunity via DAL.
acceptanceCriteria: GET handler retorna { opportunities: Opportunity[] } com status 200
POST valida via Zod (rejeita impact/effort fora de 1-5 com 400)

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/app/api/clients/\[id\]/opportunities' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: API PATCH/DELETE /api/opportunities/[id]
userStories.description: Cria src/app/api/opportunities/[id]/route.ts. PATCH aceita partial Zod (todos campos opcionais). DELETE hard delete (UI usa softReject normalmente).
acceptanceCriteria: PATCH retorna { opportunity } 200 e respeita RLS

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/app/api/opportunities/\[id\]/route' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: API POST /api/opportunities/[id]/promote
userStories.description: Cria src/app/api/opportunities/[id]/promote/route.ts. Body Zod { projectName?: string (max 200) }. Chama DAL.promote() que é idempotente. Retorna { projectId, designSessionId } (201 se criou, 200 se já promovida).
acceptanceCriteria: Idempotente: 2 chamadas seguidas retornam mesmos IDs

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/app/api/opportunities/\[id\]/promote' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: Hook useOpportunities (optimistic)
userStories.description: Cria src/hooks/use-opportunities.ts envolvendo useOptimisticCollection. Reducer customizado pra mutations: create (filtra temp + append real no reconcile), patch, softReject (PATCH status=rejected), promote (PATCH status=in_project + promotedProjectId).
acceptanceCriteria: Arquivo existe e exporta useOpportunities(clientId, initial)
Suporta mutations: create, patch, softReject, promote
Reconcile do create filtra temp + append (não map puro) — referência feedback_optimistic_reconcile_create

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/hooks/use-opportunities' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: OpportunityCard component
userStories.description: Cria src/components/opportunities/opportunity-card.tsx — derivado de sticky-card.tsx. Mostra título (truncado), descrição (1 linha), StatusChip, badge de score (impact*5 - effort), link pro Project promovido se existir. onClick abre OpportunitySheet em modo edit.
acceptanceCriteria: Recebe prop opportunity: Opportunity e onClick handler
Quando promotedProjectId existe, mostra link clicável

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/components/opportunities/opportunity-card' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: OpportunityMatrix component (2×2 board)
userStories.description: Cria src/components/opportunities/opportunity-matrix.tsx — board 2×2 com 4 quadrantes (Quick Wins, Big Bets, Fill-ins, Money Pits) conforme PRD §9. Distribui cards por impact/effort. Cada quadrante mostra top-5 + 'ver mais (N)'. Esconde rejected.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards distribuídos conforme regra (impact ≥ 4 & effort ≤ 2 → Quick Wins, etc.)

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/components/opportunities/opportunity-matrix' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: OpportunityList component (stack-ranked)
userStories.description: Cria src/components/opportunities/opportunity-list.tsx — lista priorizada por priorityRank NULLS LAST, depois score DESC, depois createdAt DESC. Toggle 'Mostrar descartadas' revela rejected. Botão Promove inline pra cards approved.
acceptanceCriteria: Ordem segue priorityRank NULLS LAST, score DESC, createdAt DESC
Botão Promove visível só pra status='approved'

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/components/opportunities/opportunity-list' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: OpportunitySheet — edit form
userStories.description: Cria src/components/opportunities/opportunity-sheet.tsx — ResponsiveSheet size=md com Field/FormBody (title, description, impact 1-5 select, effort 1-5 select, status StatusChipSelect, sourceMeetingId, sourceDesignSessionId). Footer: [Descartar | Salvar | Promover→]. Botão Promover só pra status=approved, abre ConfirmDialog.
acceptanceCriteria: Botão Promover renderiza ConfirmDialog antes de POST /promote
Validação inline impede salvar sem title ou com impact/effort fora 1-5

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'src/components/opportunities/opportunity-sheet' || echo no-errors

userStories.title: OpportunitiesWidget + wire-up em /clients/[id]
userStories.description: Cria src/components/opportunities/opportunities-widget.tsx (client component) que orquestra Matrix + List + Sheet, e edita src/app/(dashboard)/clients/[id]/page.tsx pra fazer server-fetch via DAL e passar pra widget. Inclui botão '+ Nova oportunidade' (abre sheet em modo create).
acceptanceCriteria: page.tsx do client renderiza widget abaixo do header e acima da lista de projetos
Server fetch via DAL.listByClient hidrata widget no SSR
Botão '+ Nova oportunidade' abre OpportunitySheet em modo create
Smoke browser: criar, editar score, ver re-rank ao vivo

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E '(opportunities-widget|src/app/\(dashboard\)/clients/\[id\]/page)' || echo no-errors
Abrir /clients/<id> autenticado como manager. Criar opportunity title='Test', impact=4, effort=2. Validar: aparece em Quick Wins na matriz, no topo da lista, score=18 visível.
verifiable.expected: Card visível na matriz no quadrante correto + lista re-ranked
